ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
\u26A0\uFE0F Action required to continue publishing

This update changes how the plugin connects to Flowershow. You have two options:
ast.target:
\u26A0\uFE0F 需要操作才能继续发布

此更新改变了插件连接 Flowershow 的方式。你有两个选项：

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
What changed:

  • The plugin now publishes directly to Flowershow \u2014 no GitHub repository required.
  • Faster publishing with immediate feedback.
ast.target:
变更内容：

  • 插件现在直接发布到 Flowershow \u2014 无需 GitHub 仓库。
  • 发布更快，并提供即时反馈。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Choose your workflow:

Option A: Switch to Direct Publishing (Recommended)

  1. Disconnect your site from GitHub in your dashboard to prevent sync conflicts
  2. Generate a Personal Access Token at cloud.flowershow.app/tokens
  3. Enter it in the plugin settings
  4. If you used rootDir config before, set it up in the plugin settings
  5. Publish as usual!

Option B: Keep Using GitHub

  1. Uninstall this Flowershow plugin
  2. Use another tool (e.g. Obsidian Git plugin) to sync your vault to GitHub
  3. Flowershow Cloud will continue to publish from your repository
ast.target:
选择你的工作流程：

选项 A：切换到直接发布（推荐）

  1. 在你的 控制台 中将站点与 GitHub 断开连接，以防止同步冲突
  2. 在 cloud.flowershow.app/tokens 生成个人访问令牌
  3. 在插件设置中填写它
  4. 如果之前使用过 rootDir 配置，请在插件设置中设置它
  5. 像往常一样发布！

选项 B：继续使用 GitHub

  1. 卸载此 Flowershow 插件
  2. 使用其他工具（例如 Obsidian Git 插件）将你的库同步到 GitHub
  3. Flowershow Cloud 将继续从你的仓库发布

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
The Flowershow plugin now publishes directly to Flowershow \u2014 no GitHub repository required.

You'll need a Flowershow Personal Access Token to publish. Generate one at cloud.flowershow.app/tokens.

Want to keep using GitHub? Use a separate tool (e.g. Obsidian Git) to sync your vault to GitHub. Flowershow Cloud will continue to publish from your repository.

Learn more about this update \u2192
ast.target:
Flowershow 插件现在直接发布到 Flowershow \u2014 无需 GitHub 仓库。

发布需要Flowershow 个人访问令牌。请在 cloud.flowershow.app/tokens 生成。

想继续使用 GitHub？ 使用其他工具（例如 Obsidian Git）将你的库同步到 GitHub。Flowershow Cloud 将继续从你的仓库发布。

了解此更新详情 \u2192

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Note: Patterns match against full paths from vault root.
Examples:
\u2022 ^private/ - Exclude the "private" folder at vault root
\u2022 ^blog/drafts/ - Exclude "drafts" folder inside "blog" folder
\u2022 \\.excalidraw\\.md$ - Exclude all Excalidraw files
\u2022 \\.tmp$ - Exclude all .tmp files anywhere in vault
ast.target:
注意：模式会与从库根目录开始的完整路径匹配。
示例：
\u2022 ^private/ - 排除库根目录下的“private”文件夹
\u2022 ^blog/drafts/ - 排除“blog”文件夹内的“drafts”文件夹
\u2022 \\.excalidraw\\.md$ - 排除所有 Excalidraw 文件
\u2022 \\.tmp$ - 排除库中任意位置的所有 .tmp 文件

A tree hydrated but some attributes of the server rendered HTML didn't match the client properties. This won't be patched up. This can happen if a SSR-ed Client Component used:

- A server/client branch `if (typeof window !== 'undefined')`.
- Variable input such as `Date.now()` or `Math.random()` which changes each time it's called.
- Date formatting in a user's locale which doesn't match the server.
- External changing data without sending a snapshot of it along with the HTML.
- Invalid HTML tag nesting.

It can also happen if the client has a browser extension installed which messes with the HTML before React loaded.

%s%s
ast.target:
一个树已完成水合，但服务端渲染的 HTML 的某些属性与客户端属性不匹配。这不会被修补。这可能发生在 SSR 的客户端组件使用了：

- 服务器/客户端分支 `if (typeof window !== 'undefined')`。
- 诸如 `Date.now()` 或 `Math.random()` 之类会在每次调用时变化的可变输入。
- 与服务器不一致的用户本地化日期格式。
- 外部变化的数据但未随 HTML 一起发送快照。
- 无效的 HTML 标签嵌套。

如果客户端安装了在 React 加载前篡改 HTML 的浏览器扩展，也可能发生这种情况。

%s%s
